data.name: CH340DS1.PDF
data.content:
CH340 datasheet, USB bus converter chip which converts USB to serial port, printer port, IrDA SIR etc. Integrated clock, supports various operating systems,
chip information can be customized, this datasheet is about USB to serial port and USB to Infrared Adapter SIR.
data.tag: USB to UART, USB to TTL, USB to RS232, USB to RS485

relationFileList.name: CH341SER.EXE
relationFileList.content: CH340/CH341 USB to serial port One-Key installation VCP vendor driver  for Windows, supports  Windows 11/10/8.1/8/7/VISTA/XP/2000/98，Server 2022/2019/2016/2012/2008/2003 -32/64bit, Microsoft WHQL/HCK Certified, supports USB to 3-line and 9-line serial port. Used to distribute to user with the product.
relationFileList.tag: USB to UART, USB to TTL, USB to RS232, USB to RS485

relationFileList.name: CH341DS1.PDF
relationFileList.content: CH341 datasheet, USB bus converter chip with multiple communication interfaces, such as USB to serial port/parallel port/printer port/I2C interface etc. Drivers support for Windows/Linux/Android/Mac, etc. The datasheet is the description of USB to serial port and printer port.

relationFileList.name: CH432DS1.PDF
relationFileList.content: CH432 datasheet. Dual-UART expander. Compatible with 16C550. 8-bit parallel port or SPI to UART. Each UART receive/transmit data independently. Up to 4Mbps baud rate. Can be used for MCU dual-UART expansion.  CH432 supports full-duplex/half-duplex/infrared modes.

relationFileList.name: CH438DS1.PDF
relationFileList.content: CH438 datasheet. CH438 is an 8-UART extension chip. Each UART receive/transmit has independent 128-byte FIFO. The maximum baud rate is 4Mbps. It supports hardware flow control, compatible with 16C550/16C750. It provides 8-bit parallel interface, used for MCU 8-UART extension.

relationFileList.name: CH341SER_ANDROID.ZIP
relationFileList.content: USB to Serial ports Android driver-free install, lib and demo application,  supports CH340/CH341/CH342/CH343/CH344/CH347/CH9101/CH9102/CH9103/CH9104/CH9143, for Android OS 4.4 and above in USB Host mode, without loading Android kernel driver and without root access operation. Includes apk installer, lib library file, App Demo.
relationFileList.tag: USB to serial port Android driver ,USB to UART driver for Android

relationFileList.name: CH9340DS.PDF
relationFileList.content: CH9340 datasheet, USB CDC to single serial port, built-in crystal oscillator, supports built-in CDC driver in operating system.
